plan.instructions: Work in read-only planning mode. Inspect the repository, identify constraints and risks, then return a numbered plan with explicit files and verification steps. Do not modify files or external state.

develop.instructions: Implement the confirmed plan with focused changes. Preserve unrelated work, run proportionate checks, and record concrete results and unresolved risks.

test.instructions: Prioritize reproducible verification. Run the narrowest relevant checks first, fix failures within scope, and report exact commands and outcomes.

review.instructions: Review in read-only mode. Lead with concrete bugs, regressions, security risks, and missing tests, ordered by severity and grounded in file references.
